explanations.camera_explanation: Camera sensitivity is boosted for close-range combat. Since you play as a rusher with a 4-finger setup, you need high swipe speeds to rotate your camera instantly and track opponents jumping or sliding nearby.
explanations.ads_explanation: ADS sensitivity has been adjusted to help with pull-down mechanics. Since recoil is your primary obstacle, these values give your thumb enough leverage to easily pull down the firing button and stabilize vertical muzzle climb.
explanations.gyro_explanation: Gyroscope values are scaled up on mid-tier scopes (3x and 4x) by 15%. This allows you to tilt your device slightly to counter rapid vertical recoil, taking the strain off your screen-swiping finger.
explanations.ads_gyro_explanation: ADS-Gyroscope values are set high. This ensures that when you press the fire button and tilt your phone simultaneously, the vertical compensation kicks in immediately to laser-focus your bullet grouping.
